name: pcs-tools
description: PCS Tools internal Claude Code plugins for the Kit Builder, MAP pricing, and Jira-task-builder workflows.

plugins.name: pcs-promo-parser
plugins.description: Parse vendor promo decks (Milwaukee, DeWalt, Makita, Bosch, EGO, Flex, GearWrench, Crescent) into PCS Kit Builder Stage 1 CSVs.

plugins.name: pcs-map-updater
plugins.description: Merge a vendor MAP sheet with a NetSuite ERP export, flag exceptions, and export a review-ready Excel workbook for the monthly MAP update workflow.

plugins.name: pcs-jira-task-builder
plugins.description: Beta. Reads pcs-promo-parser Stage 1 CSVs and creates matching Jira Tasks in the PCS Promotions space. Hard PROM write-protection (literal-phrase gate), defaults to PAT, per-vendor period naming, auto-HERO detection, RSA per-row review, storefront link scaffolding.

plugins.name: pcs-promo-creation
plugins.description: Guided end-to-end promo pipeline: parse a vendor deck -> build NetSuite kit imports -> create Jira promotion tasks, with a Yes/No confirmation before each stage and the hard PROM write-protection at the Jira step. Surfaces a drag-and-drop file-upload artifact at every document step (deck, cheat sheet, NetSuite export). An AI validation pass scans each stage's imports/exports before its gate, auto-correcting safe issues and flagging the rest. Orchestrates pcs-promo-parser and pcs-jira-task-builder and drives the Kit Builder kb CLI (>= 0.5.18); Claude writes each kit's Page Title and Detailed Description from the item data using the ported title/description rules; prompts for deck, pricing cheat sheet, and NetSuite Promo Kit Support export uploads when needed.
